titleStmt.title: Корпус українських історичних газет PressMint-UA (PluG), «По Україні. У Киіві», Рада, №245 29.10.1910 [PressMint.ana SAMPLE]
Ukrainian historical newspaper corpus PressMint-UA, "По Україні. У Киіві", Рада, 1910-10-29, no. 245 [PressMint.ana SAMPLE]

availability.p: This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License.

projectDesc.p: PressMint is a project creating multilingual corpora of historical newspapers.
